titleStmt.title: SII 41.369: original edition by S. Rajagopal

No. 369. (A.R. No. 584 of 1905.) Vijayamaṅgalam, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the west wall left of the entrance of the maṇḍapa, in front of the central shrine in the Nāgēśvarasvāmi temple in Vijayamaṅgalam.

summary.p: Registers an endowment of 3 kaḻañju by a member of Veḷḷāḷa Chāttupāḍikaḷ clan of Vijayamaṅgalam for offerings and for 90 lamps on the day of Śivarātri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirācakecari paṟmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirarāje
ntraratevaṟkut tiruveḻuttiṭṭuc cellāṉiṉṟa tirunalliyāṇṭu patiṉālāvatu
kuṟuppu nāṭṭu vicaiyamaṅkalattu veḷḷāḷa cāttupāṭikaḷil Uṭaiyāṉ tevaṉā
ṉa civakalliyāṇa nampiyeṉ Āḷuṭaiyār tirunākiśvaramuṭaiyāṟkuc civarāttirikku
veṇṭuvatukkuk kuṭutta poruḷ mukkaḻañcukkum Amutupaṭi nālu cantikkum tūṇippa
takkum tiruviḷakkut toṇṇūṟum Itukku veṇṭum viñcanātikaḷ Aṭṭatāka
kaikkoṇṭom yikkoyiṟ kāṇiyuṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇaril Ātrayagotrattu dakṣi
ṇāmuttiyāḷavantiyāṉa kuṟuppuṉāṭṭup paṭṭaṉum māṭalagotrattuteṟṟiyappanum māṭa
la gotrattuku nicāranuṭaiyāṉāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyirac cakkaravattiyum Ivvaṉaivom
Ittaṉmam candrādityavarai celuttuvatāka Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.369 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
